allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""message"":""I lost my phone"",""language"":""en-IN"",""history"":[]}')

Bash(python -c "import google.generativeai as genai; import os; from dotenv import load_dotenv; load_dotenv\(\); genai.configure\(api_key=os.getenv\(''GEMINI_API_KEY''\)\); models = genai.list_models\(\); print\(''Available models:''\); [print\(f''- {m.name}''\) for m in models if ''generateContent'' in m.supported_generation_methods]")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""message"":""I lost my mobile phone yesterday"",""language"":""en-IN"",""history"":[]}')
